name: chronicle
description: Generate a private project brain for onboarding and handoff from Claude Code and Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Turn AI coding sessions into Chronicle views.
interface.longDescription: Chronicle captures Claude Code and Codex session summaries through lifecycle hooks, writes Markdown source files, and renders a self-contained project-brain HTML page for onboarding and handoff. It also includes team/public views, Superpowers import, approved action intents, and generated project indexes.
defaultPrompt: Use Chronicle to render my project brain.
Use Chronicle to render my team report.
Use Chronicle to draft my public build log.
Use Chronicle to import Superpowers artifacts.
Use Chronicle to capture this session into the devlog.
